summary: Create CTB-compliant LCS Spine v0 in Neon via migration: add lcs schema, CID/SID/MID core tables and movement type registry, lifecycle/status/dispatch enums, required FKs to outreach/cl/lcs registry, append-only immutability and forward-only dispatch_state constraints, and DB-minted MID functions fn_process_cid and fn_finalize_dispatch without references to dropped views.

request.title: SCR: LCS Spine v0 (CID/SID/MID Skeleton)
request.goal: Create the initial LCS spine database skeleton in Neon with CID intake, SID skeleton, MID ledger, registries, enums, immutability controls, and database-minted MID flow.

classification.rationale: Feature work within existing parent/child doctrine. Introduces new schema objects and migration logic at execution/interface level without modifying protected CTB backbone primitives, altitude hierarchy, sovereign ID doctrine, cantonal/ERROR pattern definitions, registry enforcement model, or constitutional assets.

in_scope: Create tables: lcs.cid_intake, lcs.sid_registry, lcs.mid_ledger, lcs.movement_type_registry
Add FKs: cid_intake.outreach_id -> outreach.outreach, cid_intake.sovereign_id -> cl.company_identity(company_unique_id), cid_intake.movement_type_code -> lcs.movement_type_registry
Enforce append-only immutability for CID and MID rows
Create DB functions: lcs.fn_process_cid(p_cid uuid), lcs.fn_finalize_dispatch(p_mid uuid, p_result jsonb)

notes: All requested objects must be created via migration artifact(s) under migrations/.
Builder must not introduce dependencies on dropped/legacy views.
Immutability and state-transition enforcement must be implemented at the database layer (constraints/triggers/functions as appropriate).

acceptance: All scoped schema objects exist after applying migration(s).
Required foreign keys and constraints are present.
lcs.fn_finalize_dispatch(p_mid uuid, p_result jsonb) is callable.
No references to dropped views remain in migration SQL.
Auditor checks pass for scope and execution.

deliverables: Migration SQL implementing LCS Spine v0 skeleton and enforcement primitives
CHANGESET artifact referencing modified migration path(s) only
guardrails: Do not expand into worker/runtime engines or Lovable/frontend surfaces
Keep scope constrained to LCS spine skeleton requested in SCR
